recent_projects.name: pykefcontrol
recent_projects.summary: Python library for controling KEF speakers (LS50W2, LSX2, LS60). It supports basic commands for setting the volume, the source, and getting the media playing informations.
recent_projects.author: Robin Dupont

recent_projects.name: fudgeo
recent_projects.summary: GeoPackage support from Python.  fudgeo is a lightweight package for creating OGC GeoPackages, Feature Classes, and Tables.  Easily read and write geometries and attributes to Feature Classes and Tables using regular Python objects and SQLite syntax.
